# AGENTS.md - Lifecycle

*Auto-generated by `lifecycle sync-agents` on 2026-03-30 05:00*

## Project Management

This project uses **lifecycle** for project management.
All project data lives in a local SQLite database managed by the `lifecycle` CLI.

## Current Project Status

- **Project:** Lifecycle
- **Total Features:** 100
- **Draft:** 3
- **Human qa:** 66
- **Done:** 31

## Available Commands

### Agent Workflow (Primary)

```bash
lifecycle next --json              # Get next work item with full context
lifecycle done --result "..."       # Complete current work
lifecycle fail --reason "..."       # Report failure
lifecycle heartbeat --message "..." # Signal progress
```

### Feature Management

```bash
lifecycle feature list --json       # List all features
lifecycle feature show <id> --json  # Feature details with spec
lifecycle feature add "Name"        # Create a feature
lifecycle feature edit <id> --status <status>  # Update status
```

### Idea Queue

```bash
lifecycle idea submit "Title" --description "..."  # Submit idea
lifecycle idea process              # Auto-process pending ideas
lifecycle idea list --json           # List all ideas
```

### Iteration Cycles

```bash
lifecycle cycle start <type> <feature-id>  # Start a cycle
lifecycle cycle status               # View active cycles
```

### Collaboration

```bash
lifecycle discuss new "Title"        # Start RFC discussion
lifecycle discuss comment <id>       # Add comment
lifecycle search "query" --json      # Full-text search
```

### Other Useful Commands

```bash
lifecycle status --json              # Project overview
lifecycle history --json             # Event history
lifecycle qa pending --json          # Features awaiting QA
lifecycle queue list --json          # Work queue
lifecycle roadmap show --json        # Roadmap items
lifecycle hooks                      # Show integration hooks
lifecycle api docs                   # API documentation
```

## Workflow Patterns

### Standard Agent Loop

1. Run `lifecycle next --json` to get assigned work
2. Read the `agent_guidance` field for instructions
3. Implement the task
4. Run `lifecycle done --result "description of what was done"`
5. Repeat from step 1

### Feature State Machine

Features follow this state machine (all transitions must be valid):

```
draft -> planning -> implementing -> agent-qa -> human-qa -> done
                                                     |
                                                     v
Any state can transition to 'blocked' and back.
Features MUST go through human-qa before reaching done.
```

### Environment Variables

```bash
LIFECYCLE_AGENT_ID="my-agent"  # Stable agent identifier
```

## Important Rules

- Always use `--json` flag when consuming output programmatically
- Send heartbeats during long-running tasks to prevent stale detection
- Features must go through `human-qa` before being marked `done`
- Use `lifecycle search` to find relevant context before starting work
- Check `lifecycle feature show <id> --json` for specs before implementing
